targets.rawSql: WITH counts AS (SELECT date_trunc('hour', to_timestamp(block_timestamp / 1000.0)) AS time, netuid, COUNT(*) AS value FROM extrinsics WHERE call_module = 'SubtensorModule' AND call_function IN ('set_weights','set_mechanism_weights','batch_set_weights','commit_weights','commit_mechanism_weights','batch_commit_weights','reveal_weights','reveal_mechanism_weights','batch_reveal_weights','commit_timelocked_weights','commit_timelocked_mechanism_weights','commit_crv3_mechanism_weights') AND ('${netuid:csv}' = '*' OR netuid::text = ANY (string_to_array('${netuid:csv}', ','))) AND ('${status:csv}' = '*' OR success::text = ANY (string_to_array('${status:csv}', ','))) AND ('${address:csv}' = '*' OR address = ANY (string_to_array('${address:csv}', ','))) AND block_number BETWEEN (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__from) / 12000 AND (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__to) / 12000 GROUP BY 1, 2), buckets AS (SELECT generate_series(date_trunc('hour', to_timestamp($__from / 1000.0)), date_trunc('hour', to_timestamp($__to / 1000.0)), INTERVAL '1 hour') AS time), subnets AS (SELECT DISTINCT netuid FROM counts) SELECT b.time, lpad(s.netuid::text, 3, '0') AS metric, COALESCE(c.value, 0) AS value FROM buckets b CROSS JOIN subnets s LEFT JOIN counts c ON c.time = b.time AND c.netuid = s.netuid ORDER BY b.time, s.netuid

SELECT netuid, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE success) as "success", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE NOT success) as "failures" FROM extrinsics WHERE call_module = 'SubtensorModule' AND call_function IN ('set_weights','set_mechanism_weights','batch_set_weights','commit_weights','commit_mechanism_weights','batch_commit_weights','reveal_weights','reveal_mechanism_weights','batch_reveal_weights','commit_timelocked_weights','commit_timelocked_mechanism_weights','commit_crv3_mechanism_weights') AND ('${netuid:csv}' = '*' OR netuid::text = ANY (string_to_array('${netuid:csv}', ','))) AND ('${status:csv}' = '*' OR success::text = ANY (string_to_array('${status:csv}', ','))) AND ('${address:csv}' = '*' OR address = ANY (string_to_array('${address:csv}', ','))) AND block_number BETWEEN (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__from) / 12000 AND (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__to) / 12000 GROUP BY netuid ORDER BY netuid

SELECT 'Subnet ' || netuid::text as metric, COUNT(*) as value FROM extrinsics WHERE call_module = 'SubtensorModule' AND call_function IN ('set_weights','set_mechanism_weights','batch_set_weights','commit_weights','commit_mechanism_weights','batch_commit_weights','reveal_weights','reveal_mechanism_weights','batch_reveal_weights','commit_timelocked_weights','commit_timelocked_mechanism_weights','commit_crv3_mechanism_weights') AND ('${netuid:csv}' = '*' OR netuid::text = ANY (string_to_array('${netuid:csv}', ','))) AND ('${status:csv}' = '*' OR success::text = ANY (string_to_array('${status:csv}', ','))) AND ('${address:csv}' = '*' OR address = ANY (string_to_array('${address:csv}', ','))) AND block_number BETWEEN (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__from) / 12000 AND (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__to) / 12000 GROUP BY netuid ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 10

panels.description:
Per-subnet share of weight-setting extrinsics from the `subtensor` pallet, one column per dispatchable. Cell value = percentage of that subnet's total calls that used this method (0–100%); the gauge bar fills proportionally. `total` shows the absolute count for context. Empty cells = method not used by that subnet in the selected time window. Hover any column header for semantic notes.

**Direct (greens)** — disallowed when commit-reveal is enabled
- `set_weights`
- `set_mechanism_weights` (multi-mechanism subnets)
- `batch_set_weights` (one extrinsic, many subnets)

**Commit-reveal v1 (blues / purples)** — `commit_*` then `reveal_*` later
- `commit_weights`, `commit_mechanism_weights`, `batch_commit_weights`
- `reveal_weights`, `reveal_mechanism_weights`, `batch_reveal_weights`

**Timelocked / drand (oranges)** — chain auto-reveals on the drand round; no explicit reveal extrinsic
- `commit_timelocked_weights`
- `commit_timelocked_mechanism_weights`
- `commit_crv3_mechanism_weights` (legacy CR-v3 entry, pins `commit_reveal_version = 4`)

`total` is the row sum across all 12 methods.

properties.value: Subnet ID (zero-padded) and name when known (joined from metagraph_subnet).
Total weight-setting extrinsics for this subnet across all 12 methods.
Direct weight submission. Disallowed when commit-reveal is enabled on the subnet.
Direct weights for a specific mechanism within a multi-mechanism subnet.
One extrinsic targeting many subnets at once. Per-subnet attribution may be incomplete (see docs/todo.md).
Commit-reveal v1 commit. Reveal must follow within the commit window.
CR-v1 commit for a specific mechanism.
CR-v1 reveal. Salt + values must hash to the prior commit.
CR-v1 reveal for a specific mechanism.
Multiple CR-v1 reveals on the same subnet in one call.
Drand timelock-encrypted commit. Chain auto-reveals on the configured drand round; no explicit reveal extrinsic.
Drand timelock for a specific mechanism.
Legacy entry point that pins commit_reveal_version = 4 and delegates to commit_timelocked_mechanism_weights. Prefer commit_timelocked_mechanism_weights for new code.

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE WHEN COALESCE(s.name, '') = '' THEN lpad(e.netuid::text, 3, '0') ELSE lpad(e.netuid::text, 3, '0') || ' · ' || s.name END AS subnet, COUNT(*) AS total, ROUND(100.0 * NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE call_function = 'set_weights'), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS set_weights, ROUND(100.0 * NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE call_function = 'set_mechanism_weights'), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS set_mechanism_weights, ROUND(100.0 * NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE call_function = 'batch_set_weights'), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS batch_set_weights, ROUND(100.0 * NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE call_function = 'commit_weights'), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS commit_weights, ROUND(100.0 * NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE call_function = 'commit_mechanism_weights'), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS commit_mechanism_weights, ROUND(100.0 * NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE call_function = 'batch_commit_weights'), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS batch_commit_weights, ROUND(100.0 * NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE call_function = 'reveal_weights'), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS reveal_weights, ROUND(100.0 * NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE call_function = 'reveal_mechanism_weights'), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS reveal_mechanism_weights, ROUND(100.0 * NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE call_function = 'batch_reveal_weights'), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS batch_reveal_weights, ROUND(100.0 * NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE call_function = 'commit_timelocked_weights'), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS commit_timelocked_weights, ROUND(100.0 * NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE call_function = 'commit_timelocked_mechanism_weights'), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS commit_timelocked_mechanism_weights, ROUND(100.0 * NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE call_function = 'commit_crv3_mechanism_weights'), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS commit_crv3_mechanism_weights FROM extrinsics e LEFT JOIN metagraph_subnet s ON s.netuid = e.netuid WHERE e.call_module = 'SubtensorModule' AND e.call_function IN ('set_weights','set_mechanism_weights','batch_set_weights','commit_weights','commit_mechanism_weights','batch_commit_weights','reveal_weights','reveal_mechanism_weights','batch_reveal_weights','commit_timelocked_weights','commit_timelocked_mechanism_weights','commit_crv3_mechanism_weights') AND ('${netuid:csv}' = '*' OR e.netuid::text = ANY (string_to_array('${netuid:csv}', ','))) AND ('${status:csv}' = '*' OR e.success::text = ANY (string_to_array('${status:csv}', ','))) AND ('${address:csv}' = '*' OR e.address = ANY (string_to_array('${address:csv}', ','))) AND e.block_number BETWEEN (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__from) / 12000 AND (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__to) / 12000 GROUP BY e.netuid, s.name HAVING COUNT(*) > 0 ORDER BY e.netuid

panels.title: Weight-Setting Methods by Subnet

panels.description: Stacked count of weight-setting extrinsics over time, grouped by mechanism family. Useful for spotting migration trends (e.g. uptake of timelocked/drand commits) and aggregate volume changes.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('hour', to_timestamp(block_timestamp / 1000.0)) AS time, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE call_function IN ('set_weights','set_mechanism_weights','batch_set_weights')) AS direct, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE call_function IN ('commit_weights','commit_mechanism_weights','batch_commit_weights','reveal_weights','reveal_mechanism_weights','batch_reveal_weights')) AS commit_reveal_v1, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE call_function IN ('commit_timelocked_weights','commit_timelocked_mechanism_weights','commit_crv3_mechanism_weights')) AS timelock FROM extrinsics WHERE call_module = 'SubtensorModule' AND call_function IN ('set_weights','set_mechanism_weights','batch_set_weights','commit_weights','commit_mechanism_weights','batch_commit_weights','reveal_weights','reveal_mechanism_weights','batch_reveal_weights','commit_timelocked_weights','commit_timelocked_mechanism_weights','commit_crv3_mechanism_weights') AND ('${netuid:csv}' = '*' OR netuid::text = ANY (string_to_array('${netuid:csv}', ','))) AND ('${status:csv}' = '*' OR success::text = ANY (string_to_array('${status:csv}', ','))) AND ('${address:csv}' = '*' OR address = ANY (string_to_array('${address:csv}', ','))) AND block_number BETWEEN (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__from) / 12000 AND (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__to) / 12000 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Method Family Over Time

panels.description: Percentage of weight-setting extrinsics that failed in each time bucket. Spike = chain incident or validator misconfiguration burst.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('hour', to_timestamp(block_timestamp / 1000.0)) AS time, ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE NOT success) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS failure_rate FROM extrinsics WHERE call_module = 'SubtensorModule' AND call_function IN ('set_weights','set_mechanism_weights','batch_set_weights','commit_weights','commit_mechanism_weights','batch_commit_weights','reveal_weights','reveal_mechanism_weights','batch_reveal_weights','commit_timelocked_weights','commit_timelocked_mechanism_weights','commit_crv3_mechanism_weights') AND ('${netuid:csv}' = '*' OR netuid::text = ANY (string_to_array('${netuid:csv}', ','))) AND ('${status:csv}' = '*' OR success::text = ANY (string_to_array('${status:csv}', ','))) AND ('${address:csv}' = '*' OR address = ANY (string_to_array('${address:csv}', ','))) AND block_number BETWEEN (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__from) / 12000 AND (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__to) / 12000 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Failure Rate Over Time

panels.description:
Raw `(pallet_index=7, error_byte)` codes from `SubtensorModule`. First byte of the hex = error variant index. The chain emits the index, not the friendly name; decoding requires runtime metadata. Common codes (decode against `pallets/subtensor/src/errors.rs` in bittensor-subtensor):
- `CommitRevealEnabled` — validator submitted `set_weights` to a CR-enabled subnet
- `CommitRevealDisabled` / `CommitRevealV3Disabled` — wrong CR mode
- `NoWeightsCommitFound`, `ExpiredWeightCommit`, `RevealTooEarly`, `InvalidRevealCommitHashNotMatch` — CR-v1 reveal errors
- `TooManyUnrevealedCommits` — validator queue full
- `MaxWeightExceeded`, `WeightVecLengthIsLow`, `WeightVecNotEqualSize` — payload validation
- `MechanismDoesNotExist`, `NotRegistered` — addressing errors
Decoded names are a follow-up (F1-B) once the variant→name mapping is captured.

properties.value: First-byte hex variant; decode against pallet errors.

targets.rawSql: SELECT error_data->'dispatch_error'->'Module'->>'error' AS error_code, COUNT(*) AS count, ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 1) AS share_pct FROM extrinsics WHERE call_module = 'SubtensorModule' AND call_function IN ('set_weights','set_mechanism_weights','batch_set_weights','commit_weights','commit_mechanism_weights','batch_commit_weights','reveal_weights','reveal_mechanism_weights','batch_reveal_weights','commit_timelocked_weights','commit_timelocked_mechanism_weights','commit_crv3_mechanism_weights') AND ('${netuid:csv}' = '*' OR netuid::text = ANY (string_to_array('${netuid:csv}', ','))) AND ('${status:csv}' = '*' OR success::text = ANY (string_to_array('${status:csv}', ','))) AND ('${address:csv}' = '*' OR address = ANY (string_to_array('${address:csv}', ','))) AND block_number BETWEEN (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__from) / 12000 AND (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__to) / 12000 AND success = false AND error_data IS NOT NULL AND error_data->'dispatch_error'->'Module' IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Top Error Types

panels.description: Top hotkeys by weight-setting volume. `top_method` is the most-frequent dispatchable for the hotkey.

targets.rawSql: SELECT address, COUNT(*) AS total, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE success) AS ok, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE NOT success) AS fail, COUNT(DISTINCT netuid) AS subnets, MODE() WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY call_function) AS top_method FROM extrinsics WHERE call_module = 'SubtensorModule' AND call_function IN ('set_weights','set_mechanism_weights','batch_set_weights','commit_weights','commit_mechanism_weights','batch_commit_weights','reveal_weights','reveal_mechanism_weights','batch_reveal_weights','commit_timelocked_weights','commit_timelocked_mechanism_weights','commit_crv3_mechanism_weights') AND ('${netuid:csv}' = '*' OR netuid::text = ANY (string_to_array('${netuid:csv}', ','))) AND ('${status:csv}' = '*' OR success::text = ANY (string_to_array('${status:csv}', ','))) AND ('${address:csv}' = '*' OR address = ANY (string_to_array('${address:csv}', ','))) AND block_number BETWEEN (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__from) / 12000 AND (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__to) / 12000 AND address != '' GROUP BY address ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 25

panels.title: Top Validators by Volume

panels.description: Most-recent weight-setting call per subnet, sorted oldest first. Subnets at the top haven't had weight activity recently — possible validator outage, frozen subnet, or filter mismatch. Age is measured from `now()`, not from the dashboard time range's end.

properties.value: Time since last weight-setting call. Yellow > 1h, red > 6h.

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE WHEN COALESCE(s.name, '') = '' THEN lpad(latest.netuid::text, 3, '0') ELSE lpad(latest.netuid::text, 3, '0') || ' · ' || s.name END AS subnet, to_timestamp(latest.block_timestamp / 1000.0) AS last_call, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (now() - to_timestamp(latest.block_timestamp / 1000.0))) AS age, latest.call_function AS method, latest.address AS hotkey FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (netuid) netuid, block_timestamp, call_function, address FROM extrinsics WHERE call_module = 'SubtensorModule' AND call_function IN ('set_weights','set_mechanism_weights','batch_set_weights','commit_weights','commit_mechanism_weights','batch_commit_weights','reveal_weights','reveal_mechanism_weights','batch_reveal_weights','commit_timelocked_weights','commit_timelocked_mechanism_weights','commit_crv3_mechanism_weights') AND ('${netuid:csv}' = '*' OR netuid::text = ANY (string_to_array('${netuid:csv}', ','))) AND ('${status:csv}' = '*' OR success::text = ANY (string_to_array('${status:csv}', ','))) AND ('${address:csv}' = '*' OR address = ANY (string_to_array('${address:csv}', ','))) AND block_number BETWEEN (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__from) / 12000 AND (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__to) / 12000 ORDER BY netuid, block_timestamp DESC) latest LEFT JOIN metagraph_subnet s ON s.netuid = latest.netuid ORDER BY latest.block_timestamp ASC

panels.title: Stalled Subnets (Most-Recent Weight Call)

panels.description: Per-validator share of weight-setting extrinsics, one column per dispatchable. Same shape as `Weight-Setting Methods by Subnet` but rows are hotkeys (top 50 by volume). Cell value = % of that validator's total calls that used this method (0–100%); the gauge bar fills proportionally.

targets.rawSql: WITH top_validators AS (SELECT address, COUNT(*) AS total FROM extrinsics WHERE call_module = 'SubtensorModule' AND call_function IN ('set_weights','set_mechanism_weights','batch_set_weights','commit_weights','commit_mechanism_weights','batch_commit_weights','reveal_weights','reveal_mechanism_weights','batch_reveal_weights','commit_timelocked_weights','commit_timelocked_mechanism_weights','commit_crv3_mechanism_weights') AND ('${netuid:csv}' = '*' OR netuid::text = ANY (string_to_array('${netuid:csv}', ','))) AND ('${status:csv}' = '*' OR success::text = ANY (string_to_array('${status:csv}', ','))) AND ('${address:csv}' = '*' OR address = ANY (string_to_array('${address:csv}', ','))) AND block_number BETWEEN (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__from) / 12000 AND (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__to) / 12000 AND address != '' GROUP BY address ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 50) SELECT e.address AS hotkey, COUNT(*) AS total, ROUND(100.0 * NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE call_function = 'set_weights'), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS set_weights, ROUND(100.0 * NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE call_function = 'set_mechanism_weights'), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS set_mechanism_weights, ROUND(100.0 * NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE call_function = 'batch_set_weights'), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS batch_set_weights, ROUND(100.0 * NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE call_function = 'commit_weights'), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS commit_weights, ROUND(100.0 * NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE call_function = 'commit_mechanism_weights'), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS commit_mechanism_weights, ROUND(100.0 * NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE call_function = 'batch_commit_weights'), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS batch_commit_weights, ROUND(100.0 * NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE call_function = 'reveal_weights'), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS reveal_weights, ROUND(100.0 * NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE call_function = 'reveal_mechanism_weights'), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS reveal_mechanism_weights, ROUND(100.0 * NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE call_function = 'batch_reveal_weights'), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS batch_reveal_weights, ROUND(100.0 * NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE call_function = 'commit_timelocked_weights'), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS commit_timelocked_weights, ROUND(100.0 * NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE call_function = 'commit_timelocked_mechanism_weights'), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS commit_timelocked_mechanism_weights, ROUND(100.0 * NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE call_function = 'commit_crv3_mechanism_weights'), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS commit_crv3_mechanism_weights FROM extrinsics e INNER JOIN top_validators tv ON tv.address = e.address WHERE e.call_module = 'SubtensorModule' AND e.call_function IN ('set_weights','set_mechanism_weights','batch_set_weights','commit_weights','commit_mechanism_weights','batch_commit_weights','reveal_weights','reveal_mechanism_weights','batch_reveal_weights','commit_timelocked_weights','commit_timelocked_mechanism_weights','commit_crv3_mechanism_weights') AND ('${netuid:csv}' = '*' OR e.netuid::text = ANY (string_to_array('${netuid:csv}', ','))) AND ('${status:csv}' = '*' OR e.success::text = ANY (string_to_array('${status:csv}', ','))) AND ('${address:csv}' = '*' OR e.address = ANY (string_to_array('${address:csv}', ','))) AND e.block_number BETWEEN (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__from) / 12000 AND (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__to) / 12000 GROUP BY e.address HAVING COUNT(*) > 0 ORDER BY total DESC

panels.title: Weight-Setting Methods by Validator

list.definition: SELECT netuid AS __value, netuid || ' - ' || COALESCE(name, 'Unknown') AS __text FROM metagraph_subnet WHERE netuid != 0 ORDER BY netuid
list.label: Subnet
list.name: netuid
list.query: SELECT netuid AS __value, netuid || ' - ' || COALESCE(name, 'Unknown') AS __text FROM metagraph_subnet WHERE netuid != 0 ORDER BY netuid

list.definition: SELECT address FROM extrinsics WHERE address != '' AND block_number > COALESCE((SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics), 0) - 50000 GROUP BY address ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 100
list.label: Address (top 100)
list.name: address
list.query: SELECT address FROM extrinsics WHERE address != '' AND block_number > COALESCE((SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics), 0) - 50000 GROUP BY address ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 100
